# `library_codex.math.ChineseRemainder`

非互いに素な法のCRT・balanced bigint CRT・法付きGarner。

- 計算量の目安: 通常 $O(K\log M)$、Garner $O(K^2)$
- source: [`math/ChineseRemainder.py`](../../../math/ChineseRemainder.py)
- 公開API: function 4、class 0、method/property 0（Python protocol 0を含む）

## Import

```python
from library_codex.math.ChineseRemainder import inv_gcd, chinese_remainder, chinese_remainder_balanced, garner_mod
```
